title: cistanche flava subsp. flava
intro: Cistanche flava subsp. flava, also known as the "Rou Cong Rong," is a type of plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae and is commonly found in the desert regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cistanche flava subsp. flava include improving kidney function, enhancing immune system function, and increasing physical endurance, as well as possessing potential anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. Cistanche flava subsp. flava is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to enhance its medicinal effects.
